title: arbitrary-send-eth
summary: This finding is severe enough to require immediate containment and should block promotion until reviewed.
rationale: This finding is severe enough to require immediate containment and should block promotion until reviewed.
remediation: Review the affected contract logic, patch the vulnerable code path, rerun static analysis, and require secure code review before redeployment.

evidence.description: VulnerableBank.emergencyDrain() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#38-45) sends eth to arbitrary user Dangerous calls: - (success,None) = address(msg.sender).call{value: amount}() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#41)

title: reentrancy-eth
summary: This finding is severe enough to require immediate containment and should block promotion until reviewed.
rationale: This finding is severe enough to require immediate containment and should block promotion until reviewed.
remediation: Review the affected contract logic, patch the vulnerable code path, rerun static analysis, and require secure code review before redeployment.

evidence.description: Reentrancy in VulnerableBank.withdraw() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#21-32): External calls: - (success,None) = address(msg.sender).call{value: amount}() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#25) State variables written after the call(s): - balances[msg.sender] = 0 (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#28) VulnerableBank.balances (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#5) can be used in cross function reentrancies: - VulnerableBank.balances (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#5) - VulnerableBank.deposit() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#12-19) - VulnerableBank.withdraw() (contracts/VulnerableBank.sol#21-32)

rationale: This finding is informational and is being retained for audit visibility.

evidence.description: Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html) - VerbatimInvalidDeduplication - FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder - MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess. It is used by: - ^0.8.20 (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/ReentrancyGuard.sol#4) - ^0.8.20 (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/StorageSlot.sol#5)
